title: CUB Banking Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating India's mobile banking for financial empowerment and seamless experience.
problem_statement: CUB's current mobile banking lacks differentiated features, personalized insights, and proactive financial guidance for Indian users.

pillars.title: Financial Literacy
pillars.insight: Many Indians lack financial education and need guidance.

pillars.title: Trust & Security
pillars.insight: Users prioritize secure, reliable banking platforms for transactions.

pillars.title: Digital Adoption
pillars.insight: Bridging the gap for new digital users with simple interfaces.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we personalize CUB banking for diverse Indian users?
How might users achieve financial goals with CUB's proactive guidance?
How might we integrate community-driven financial solutions?

data.name: HDFC Bank
pros: Strong brand trust, wide branch network.
cons: App can be complex, generic features.

data.name: ICICI Bank
cons: Customer service issues, UI can be dated.

points.name: ICICI
points.desc: Decent features, but UX can be inconsistent.

points.name: SBI YONO
points.desc: Broad reach, but poor UX and limited innovation.

points.name: Paytm Bank
points.desc: Good UX for payments, limited full banking.

solution.name: CUB NextGen
solution.desc: Personalized, proactive, and intuitive financial hub.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to manage my finances easily.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient, intelligent financial management and investment opportunities.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Managing business and personal finances is tough.
personas.bio: Entrepreneur needing simple tools for daily transactions and clear financial overview.

points.action: Replace generic 'Daily Expense' with smart budget insights.
points.benefit: Empowers users with clear spending visibility.

points.action: Integrate financial goal setting with automated savings features.
Adapt UPI's ease-of-use for all banking transactions.
Modify 'Instant Fund Transfer' to include group payments.

pivot.before: Passive display of account data and basic transaction capabilities.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from transactional banking to proactive financial guidance and personalized insights.
pivot.after: Intelligent financial assistant, empowering users with control and growth.

stages.actions: Clicks banner, navigates to bill pay
stages.friction: Banner is promotional, not direct feature.

annotations.title: Personalized Dashboard
annotations.rationale: Replaces generic 'Daily Expense' with actionable spending insights.

annotations.title: Proactive Bill Pay
annotations.rationale: Integrates bill reminders and auto-pay options directly into quick actions.

annotations.title: Smart Fund Transfer
annotations.rationale: Suggests frequent payees and categorizes transactions automatically.

data.finding: Available balance is masked by default, requiring extra tap.
Bottom navigation icons lack clear labels, inconsistent visual style.
No clear confirmation or undo for fund transfers visible.
Limited customization options for dashboard or quick links.
